across.clue: If people are modest, they do not think that they are too important.
A burglar is someone who breaks into a building to steal things.
To coexist with something means to exist with it in the same time and place.
To implicate someone is to show that they have done a crime or something bad.
To comprehend something means to understand it.
A newcomer is a person who has recently arrived at a place or a group.
To outweigh something means to exceed it in value, amount, or importance.
A funnel is a cone-shaped tool for pouring liquids into a small opening.
An emergency is a time when someone needs help right away.

down.clue: To render something means to make it become something else.
If something is imperial, then it is related to an empire.
An asteroid is a giant rock from outer space.
a period of 1000 years or the beginning of a period of 1000 years.
A coconut is a large brown fruit that has a hard shell and white flesh.
A pedestrian is a person who is walking on a street.
Psychology involves the study of how the brain affects our thought and actions.
To endorse is to express formal support or approval for someone or something.
To be cynical is to be unwilling to believe that people have good intentions.
To reject is to refuse to accept, believe in, or agree with something.
